channel.title: Digital Transformation on
channel.description: Recent content in Digital Transformation on

item.title: Summary - Technology Trends Outlook 2025 by McKinsey
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
Summary - Technology Trends Outlook 2025 by McKinsey
#

Introduction
#

This article is based on the McKinsey & Company Technology Trends Outlook 2025, a comprehensive report detailing 13 frontier technology trends expected to shape business and innovation in 2025. It covers advancements, adoption levels, investment trends, and challenges across various sectors. Below, I’ve highlighted the top 10 news points derived from this report, focusing on key insights and developments for 2025, as requested. Since the report is the sole reference, all points are drawn directly from its content.

item.title: Understanding the Business of Marketplaces
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
Understanding the Business of Marketplaces: A Digital Economy Guide
#

Introduction
#

For a long time, I have been puzzled by the online marketplace. As a result, I wanted to understand how it works, the different types of marketplaces, and their business models. During my research, it became overwhelming, so in this article, I focus on categorizing and listing important marketplaces to help my readers.

item.title: All About AI Hype
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
All About AI Hype
#

Artificial Intelligence (AI) is a buzzword that has permeated almost every aspect of modern life. From the way we work and communicate to how we manage our environment and interact with animals, AI’s impact is being felt far and wide. But how deep is this impact, really? Is it truly revolutionary, or is it just another over-hyped trend that will fade with time?

item.title: AI Usecases in Government
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
AI Usecases in Government
#

Preliminary Work before any AI Project with Government
#

Keeping technology evolution, cost of latest technologies, government expectations in mind one should do following steps.

Understanding
#

  1. Understand the mission, objective, goals of the portfolio or ministry. What is important for them like efficiency, public service enacting or enhancing, economic growth (jobs creation, agriculture production, food production, industrial production, startup etc)
  2. Understand AI policy of government, ministry, and department
  3. Understand their roadblocks/impediments in delivering the public service
  4. Understand the complete hierarchy from minister to peon and various departments under the portfolio
  5. Understand their metrics, formula to calculate the metric, frequency, data source, liveness of the source, reliability.
  6. Create stakholder power-interest grid, stakeholder and their metrics/KRA
  7. AI Awareness: Articulate clearly what are AI capabilities and what not. Given the avilable data and technology, articulate what is possible and what is not.
  8. Assess the infrastructre required and tentative cost.
  9. Understand regulatory framework involving compliance, approvals, audits etc.
  10. With examples understand how important is transparency, fairness, accountablity, public safety and trust is important them.

Solution Usecases should Consider
#

  1. Ethical Aspect: Address the ethical implications of AI. How responsible AI can ensure this more efficiently.
  2. Regulatory Framework: Address regulatory framework and how AI can ensure higher compliance, more collaboration between the government, industry, and academia to create effective regulations.
  3. Data Privacy and Security: Address how data privacy and security measures can be taken care by AI systems.

Opportunities to Engage more
#

  1. Education and Workforce Development: Address how AI takes care of workforce training/skilling/upskilling need.
  2. Public Perception and Awareness: Address how AI can be effective in removing misconceptions or concerns about government policies prevalent in society.
  3. Collaboration Opportunities: Propose how AI opens new avenues for collaboration between the government, public and public-private partnerships.
  4. Case Studies and Success Stories: Provide examples of successful AI implementations in other regions or sectors. Case

AI Usecases in Government - across sectors
#

  1. Healthcare: AI can improve diagnostics, personalized medicine, and patient care through predictive analytics, image analysis, and disease prediction models. AI can reduce healthcare costs, improve treatment outcomes, and enhance accessibility to healthcare services. AI can assist in remote diagnostics or provide healthcare services in underserved areas

item.title: Business Usecases of GPT
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
Business-Usecases-of-GPT
#

Introduction
#

You will not lose your job because of AI, but you may lose it because you didn’t learn how to use AI in your job.

Artificial Intelligence (AI) has become increasingly prevalent in the modern workplace, and one of the most promising applications of AI is the use of Generative Pre-trained Transformer (GPT) models. GPT is a type of deep learning model that is capable of generating human-like text based on a given prompt. It has been used in a wide range of applications, from language translation and sentiment analysis to chatbots and content generation.

item.title: The Interconnectedness of Life and Data
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
The Interconnectedness of Life and Data
#

Introduction
#

While reading below keep your mind open. If you can keep your religious or even scientific information aside it would help you understand my thoughts. For many of you these may be hard ideas to digest, therefore reading multiple times and thinking over again and again will help.

item.title: Will AI Replace Human?
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
Artificial Intelligence can Replace Human?
#

The Success of ChatGPT has taken the world by storm. Unless you are not living in some cave you already know what is happening. People are asking questions like will AI replace humans? What will happen to our jobs? What are the challenges? I thought let me write my thought on this. There was significant overlap between these phases, so don’t assume that when one phase was over then only the second started.

item.title: Top 10 Technologies of Future
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
Top 10 Technologies of Future
#

Augmented Reality :
#

Helps surgeons see inside their patients
Help workers operating in dangerous conditions

Lab-Grown Meat: To save the environment
#

Address the ethical issues raised by industrial farming
